perspectives.name: LP Fiduciary
perspectives.question: Are fees eating alpha?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Gross-to-net IRR spread exceeds 300bps or management fee drag on uninvested capital exceeds 50bps annualized

perspectives.name: Pacing Risk Analyst
perspectives.question: Over-deploying into late-cycle?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Deployment pace exceeds target by 20%+ AND market cycle indicators suggest late-cycle (cap rate compression, elevated construction, rising rates)

perspectives.name: Regulatory Compliance
perspectives.question: ERISA plan asset rules? CFIUS?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: ERISA benefit plan investors exceed 20% of fund (approaching 25% trigger) OR foreign investor concentration exceeds 30% without CFIUS analysis

perspectives.name: Concentration Risk
perspectives.question: Diversified across vintage, geography, asset type?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Any single asset exceeds 20% of fund NAV OR top 3 geographies exceed 60% of deployed capital OR single vintage year exceeds 40% of deployments

verdictReconciliation: Challenge verdict overrides pipeline verdict if it differs. LP Fiduciary and Pacing Risk perspectives carry veto weight on DEPLOY verdicts.
